steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to contrast the two refuges. A contrast highlights a meaningful difference between them, typically using a word like 'while' or 'whereas.'

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'Some NWRs were established specifically to protect endangered species...': Makes a general statement about NWRs without comparing St. Johns and Bitter Creek to each other. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Both the St. Johns NWR and the Bitter Creek NWR were established to protect endangered species': Highlights a similarity, not a contrast. ✗
  • Choice C — 'While the St. Johns NWR is in Florida, on the Atlantic coast, the Bitter Creek NWR is in California, on the Pacific coast': Uses 'While' to directly contrast the two refuges by their geography — opposite coasts of the country. ✓
  • Choice D — 'The US has designated more than 500 areas NWRs, including the St. Johns NWR in Florida': Mentions only one refuge in context of a broader statistic; no comparison between the two refuges. ✗
That matches choice C — C is correct.
